calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Capital One (USA), N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Sonia Calderon.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Capital One, (USA), M. A. and against Defendant Sonia Calderon as follows:
Damages $2,862.80
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $284.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $3,146.80
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Set For Trial On Dec-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
